question: Which marketing traffic sources bring in the most revenue?
sql:
SELECT
  u.traffic_source,
  ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price), 2) AS revenue,
  COUNT(DISTINCT u.id) AS customers
FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` AS oi
JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.users` AS u
  ON oi.user_id = u.id
GROUP BY u.traffic_source
ORDER BY revenue DESC
report: Search is by far the dominant acquisition channel, driving $7.63M from 56,165 customers - more than 4x the next channel. Organic follows at $1.63M, with Facebook ($629K), Email ($542K), and Display ($432K) contributing smaller shares. Search visibility is clearly the company's highest-leverage marketing channel.
